name: StakeStone Ether
redeem: STONE can be redeemed for ETH through StakeStone at the contract exchange rate. Instant withdrawal is available only when the ETH buffer has liquidity; otherwise users request withdrawal and wait while underlying restaking positions are unstaked and settled.
notes: Non-rebase yield-bearing ETH token and LayerZero OFT. Exit clarity is good, but instant liquidity depends on buffer availability and underlying strategies can change.
